# PromptLean

> PromptLean is a free, open-source library of 70 token-efficient prompts across 14 categories. Every prompt ships with three variants — Lean, Balanced, and Max Quality — with model notes and quality benchmarks for 8 frontier LLMs.

## What it does

- Provides ready-to-use prompts for code review, research, creative writing, career, education, mental health, and more
- Each prompt has 3 variants: Lean (18–40 tokens), Balanced (50–110 tokens), Max Quality (85–230 tokens)
- Every prompt includes model-specific notes and a quality matrix (1–5) for 8 frontier models
- Lean variant saves 80–87% of tokens vs Max Quality with minimal quality loss

## Live site

https://kishormorol.github.io/promptlean/

## Source code

https://github.com/kishormorol/promptlean

## Categories (70 prompts)

- Code (10): Code Review, Explain Code, Write Unit Tests, Debug & Fix a Bug, Refactor Code, Write Code Documentation, Generate Regex, Translate Code, Developer Relations Consultant, Cybersecurity Strategy Advisor
- Data (8): Optimize SQL Query, Data Cleaning Plan, EDA Plan, Statistical Analysis Advisor, Excel Formula Specialist, Unstructured Text to JSON, Annual Report Analyst, Data Visualization Advisor
- Research (4): Summarize Research Paper, Literature Review, Debate Both Sides, Venture Capital Analyst
- Writing (6): Write a Technical Blog Post, Write API Docs, Cold Email, Executive Summary, Ad Copy Generator, Social Media Post Optimizer
- AI / ML (2): LLM Evaluation Rubric, System Prompt Writer
- Productivity (7): Meeting Notes → Action Items, Weekly Planner, Email Reply, Decision Framework, Startup Idea Generator, Personal Finance Advisor, Legal Contract Reviewer
- Engineering (7): System Design Review, Product Requirements Document, Incident Postmortem, Architecture Decision Record, IT Solution Architect, UX/UI Design Reviewer, Software Project Planner
- General Purpose (6): Summarize Any Text, Brainstorm Ideas, Explain Like I'm 5, Give Feedback, Fallacy Finder, Product Critique & Feedback
- Well-being & Mental Health (3): Daily Reflection & Journaling Guide, Stress Reframe, Goal Setting
- Safety & Crisis Support (1): Compassionate Crisis Response
- Supportive Conversation (1): Active Listening & Emotional Support
- Entertainment & Creative (3): Short Story Generator, Poem Generator, Character Creator
- Education & Tutoring (6): Explain Any Concept, Socratic Tutoring, Generate Practice Questions, Lesson Plan, Study Guide, Word Etymology Explorer
- Career & Professional Growth (6): Resume Review, Interview Preparation Coach, Cover Letter, LinkedIn Post, Salary Negotiation, Performance Review

## Models covered

GPT-5.4, claude-sonnet-4-6, claude-opus-4-6, gemini-3.1-pro, grok-4, llama-4-scout, mistral-large-3, o1

## Stack

Pure HTML + CSS + Vanilla JS. No framework, no build step. Data-driven via data/prompts.json. Hosted on GitHub Pages.

## Compared to alternatives

- AwesomePrompts: PromptLean has structured variants and model benchmarks, not just a flat list
- FlowGPT: PromptLean is open-source, no account required, and focused on quality over quantity
- PromptHero: PromptLean is developer/creator focused with token counts and model-specific guidance
- OpenPrompt: PromptLean is actively maintained with April 2026 frontier model coverage

## Author

Md Kishor Morol — https://github.com/kishormorol
